page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter stag weekend budget
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter for a Stag Weekend: Budget Planning

data.meta_description: Plan a marbella yacht charter stag weekend budget from €749 for 2 hours. Compare boat specs, inclusions, and hidden costs for your group.
data.summary: A practical guide to budgeting a marbella yacht charter stag weekend, covering boat options, inclusions, and cost-saving tips for groups.
key_facts: Stag yacht charters start at €749 for 2 hours on an Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 (up to 11 guests).
All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% Spanish IVA.
Larger boats like the Mangusta 80 (12 pax) cost €4,719 for 4 hours and include a free jet ski.
Charter durations range from 2 to 8 hours; 4-hour trips are the most popular for stag groups.
All boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's main marina—easy for nightlife access.
Hidden costs are minimal: only extras like premium catering, water toys, or extended hours.
Book via WhatsApp for pricing on boats not listed in Tier A or B (e.g., Ferretti 94, Pershing 46).
Best value for groups of up to 11 is the Azimut 39 at €749/2h; the 12-guest Azimut 58 Flybridge is quoted on WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is the cheapest option for a stag yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: The most affordable option is the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks. For a 4-hour trip, it's €1,299, making it ideal for a smaller stag group of up to 11 guests.

faq.q: Are there any hidden costs on a Marbella stag yacht charter?
faq.a: No hidden costs—our prices include the licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% IVA. Extras like premium catering, additional hours, or water toys can be arranged at an extra cost.

faq.q: How many guests can join a stag yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Our boats accommodate from 5 to 12 guests. The Dubhe (5 pax) and Speedboat (6 pax) are ideal for small groups. For stags of 10–12, the Azimut 58 Flybridge, Mangusta 80, or Ferretti 94 are perfect.

faq.q: Can we bring our own food and drinks on a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks—there are no restrictions. However, we already include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Many groups opt for a catering upgrade for a barbecue or tapas platter.

faq.q: What is the best duration for a stag weekend yacht charter?
faq.a: A 4-hour charter is the most popular for stag groups—enough time to cruise the coast, swim at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, enjoy drinks, and return to Puerto Banús for nightlife. For a full day, 8-hour charters offer lunch stops and more swimming.

faq.q: Can we add a jet ski or water toys to our stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) includes a free jet ski for 4-hour charters (€4,719). For other boats, you can add a jet ski or paddleboards at an extra cost—ask via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Cancellation policies vary by boat and season. Generally, we require 48–72 hours' notice for a full refund. For last-minute cancellations, a partial refund or rescheduling may be possible. Contact us via WhatsApp for specific terms.

faq.q: Do we need to pay a deposit to secure a stag yacht charter?
faq.a: Yes, a 50% deposit is typically required to confirm the booking, with the balance due 7 days before departure. Payment can be made via bank transfer or card. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact terms.

data.body_html:
Planning a stag weekend in Marbella and thinking about a yacht charter? It's one of the best ways to celebrate—sun, sea, and a floating party with your mates. But without a solid budget, costs can spiral. This guide breaks down exactly what you'll pay for a marbella yacht charter stag weekend budget, from €749 for a 2-hour blast on an Astondoa 40 to €4,719 for a 4-hour Mangusta 80 with a free jet ski. We cover inclusions, hidden costs, and which boat suits your group size. Let's dive in.

Why a Yacht Charter Works for a Stag Weekend

Marbella's coastline is tailor-made for a stag do. Puerto Banús is the epicentre of nightlife, but a yacht lets you escape the crowds for a few hours. You'll cruise past the Golden Mile, anchor at Cala del Faro for a swim, and return ready for dinner and drinks. With all-inclusive pricing (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA), there are no surprise bills. Just split the cost among the lads, and you're sorted.

Boat Options and Prices for Your Stag Group

We have boats for any stag group size. Here's a quick comparison of the most popular options:

BoatMax GuestsPrice (2h)Price (8h)Notes
Astondoa 409€749€2,299Great value, departs Puerto Banús
Azimut 3911€749€2,299Spacious for a small stag
Azimut 58 Flybridge12On requestOn requestFlybridge for sunbathing — quote on WhatsApp
Mangusta 8012€4,719 (4h min)—Includes free jet ski
Ferretti 9412On requestOn requestLuxury option, contact us

For groups of up to 11, the Azimut 39 at €749/2h is a steal; for a full stag of 12, ask for an Azimut 58 Flybridge quote on WhatsApp. If you want a jet ski included, go for the Mangusta 80 at €4,719 for 4 hours. For smaller stags (5–8), the Bandido or Speedboat work well—pricing on request via WhatsApp.

What's Included in Your Stag Yacht Charter?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper (no need for a boating licence), fuel, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You also get water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. That means you can focus on the party, not logistics. Want more? You can bring your own food and drinks, or upgrade to a catering package (tapas, barbecue, paella) at an extra cost.

Hidden Costs to Watch Out For

With our all-inclusive pricing, hidden costs are minimal. The main extras are: premium catering (e.g., seafood platters, champagne), water toys like jet skis or paddleboards (unless included), and extending the charter beyond your booked hours. Always confirm your itinerary with the skipper—some anchorages like Cala Cortés may have small mooring fees (usually €10–20, included in our pricing).

How to Split the Cost Among the Stag Group

Let's say you book the Azimut 39 for 4 hours (€1,299) with 10 guests. That's €130 per person. Add an hour on the Sea-Doo jet ski for €250 (€25 each) and you're at €155 a head — drinks, snacks and the skipper are already included, so there's little else to pay. For a 2-hour charter on the Astondoa 40 (€749) with 9 guests, it's just €83 each. Use a money-splitting app to keep it simple. Remember to budget for tips for the skipper—10–15% is customary.

Best Itineraries for a Stag Weekend Yacht Charter

For a 4-hour charter, leave Puerto Banús, head east past the Golden Mile to Cala del Faro for swimming and photos with La Concha in the background. Then cruise back to Marbella Marina for a quick stop, or continue west to Cabopino for a beach club lunch. For an 8-hour day, go further to Estepona or Sotogrande—more time for swimming, eating, and sunbathing. The skipper knows the best spots for stag groups.

What to Bring on a Stag Yacht Charter

Pack sunscreen (SPF 50+), sunglasses, a hat, swimwear, a towel, and a light jacket for the evening breeze. Bring your own music playlist—the boat has a Bluetooth speaker. If you're planning to swim, bring snorkel gear (we have some onboard). And don't forget a GoPro or waterproof phone case for photos. Leave glass bottles at home—use plastic or cans for safety.

How to Book Your Stag Yacht Charter

Booking is straightforward. Visit our homepage to browse the fleet, then contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred boat, date, and duration. We'll confirm availability and send a booking link. A 50% deposit secures the date, with the balance due 7 days before. For last-minute bookings (within 48 hours), full payment is required. We recommend booking at least 2–3 weeks in advance for summer weekends.

Frequently asked questions

What is the cheapest option for a stag yacht charter in Marbella?

The most affordable option is the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39 at €749 for 2 hours, including skipper, fuel, drinks, and snacks. For a 4-hour trip, it's €1,299, making it ideal for a smaller stag group of up to 11 guests.

Are there any hidden costs on a Marbella stag yacht charter?

No hidden costs—our prices include the licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and 21% IVA. Extras like premium catering, additional hours, or water toys can be arranged at an extra cost.

How many guests can join a stag yacht charter in Marbella?

Our boats accommodate from 5 to 12 guests. The Dubhe (5 pax) and Speedboat (6 pax) are ideal for small groups. For stags of 10–12, the Azimut 58 Flybridge, Mangusta 80, or Ferretti 94 are perfect.

Can we bring our own food and drinks on a stag yacht charter?

Yes, you can bring your own food and drinks—there are no restrictions. However, we already include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Many groups opt for a catering upgrade for a barbecue or tapas platter.

What is the best duration for a stag weekend yacht charter?

A 4-hour charter is the most popular for stag groups—enough time to cruise the coast, swim at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, enjoy drinks, and return to Puerto Banús for nightlife. For a full day, 8-hour charters offer lunch stops and more swimming.

Can we add a jet ski or water toys to our stag yacht charter?

Yes. The Mangusta 80 (white or grey) includes a free jet ski for 4-hour charters (€4,719). For other boats, you can add a jet ski or paddleboards at an extra cost—ask via WhatsApp for availability and pricing.

What is the cancellation policy for a stag yacht charter?

Cancellation policies vary by boat and season. Generally, we require 48–72 hours' notice for a full refund. For last-minute cancellations, a partial refund or rescheduling may be possible. Contact us via WhatsApp for specific terms.

Do we need to pay a deposit to secure a stag yacht charter?

Yes, a 50% deposit is typically required to confirm the booking, with the balance due 7 days before departure. Payment can be made via bank transfer or card. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact terms.
